headings.text: Meridian Ellipse: Streaming Audio At Its Finest
Meridian Ellipse: Streaming Audio At Its Finest
A Complete Meridian System in a Single Speaker

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingMeridian Ellipse: Streaming Audio At Its FinestPosted on March 12, 2025Meridian Ellipse: Streaming Audio At Its FinestElegant, simple, and powerful—the Meridian Ellipse is the latest evolution of high-performance all-in-one streaming speakers.Designed for exceptional sound quality, Ellipse delivers room-filling, lifelike audio in a beautifully compact form.‍‍‍A Complete Meridian System in a Single SpeakerEllipse is the third loudspeaker to emerge from Meridian’s Extreme Engineering Programme, representing a distillation of everything Meridian does best. Despite its sleek and compact design, Ellipse produces deep bass and clear, authoritative projection, typically found in much larger speakers.Crafted in Britain with state-of-the-art components and meticulous attention to detail, Ellipse is designed for pure music enjoyment—bringing Meridian’s signature sound quality to any space.‍‍Modern, Sleek AestheticDesigned to complement contemporary interiors, Ellipse’s elliptical shape echoes Meridian’s design DNA, offering a smooth, pebble-like form in deep, non-reflective black. The soft-touch finish not only enhances its luxurious look but also makes it an inviting addition to any space.‍‍Total Digital Connectivity & StreamingMeridian Ellipse supports the latest streaming technologies, making it effortless to enjoy music from your preferred services. Connectivity options include:AirPlay & Google Cast – Stream directly from Apple and Android devices.Spotify Connect & TIDAL Connect – Native support for high-quality music streaming.Roon Ready & UPnP Renderer – Perfect for audiophiles seeking a high-resolution, multi-room audio experience.Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, & Ethernet – Enjoy both wireless convenience and wired stability.‍‍Engineered for Uncompromising PerformanceEllipse distills the technological advancements of Meridian’s flagship DSP8000 XE and DSP9 into a compact yet powerful speaker. Key innovations include:Sealed Cabinet Design – Prevents unwanted resonance for pure, distortion-free sound.Advanced Bass & Space Features – Optimizes sound based on room size and placement.Image Elevation Technology – Enhances sound staging for an immersive, lifelike experience.‍‍Effortless Control at Your FingertipsDesigned for intuitive use, Ellipse features illuminated touch controls on the top panel for instant access to playback functions. Flexible setup options and powerful user settings allow for a personalized listening experience without complexity.‍‍The Future of Streaming AudioWith cutting-edge engineering, seamless connectivity, and a refined aesthetic, the Meridian Ellipse redefines the all-in-one speaker. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, or office, it delivers true Meridian performance in a speaker that is as beautiful as it is powerful.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
